name: Pollination Process
description: Pollination Process process visualization. This process flowchart outlines key steps, checks, and outputs.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A3[Pollen Development] --> B3[Anther Dehiscence]
    C3[Pollinator Activity] --> D3[Pollen Transfer]
    B3 --> D3
    D3 --> E3[Stigma Reception]
    E3 --> F3[Pollen Adhesion]
    F3 --> G3[Hydration]
    G3 --> H3[Germination]
    H3 --> I3[Pollen Tube Growth]
    I3 --> J3[Style Navigation]
    J3 --> K3[Ovary Entry]
    K3 --> L3[Double Fertilization]
    
    style A3 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style C3 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style D3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style E3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style F3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style G3 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style H3 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style I3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style J3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style K3 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style L3 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Process visualization: Pollination Process. Created using the Programming Framework methodology.

sources.title: Fruit development, the sexual process, and abscission in citrus following pollination /

sources.authors: SHIBATA, Kengo; TAKANASHI, Takuma; KOIKE, Takuji
sources.journal: The Proceedings of the JSME Conference on Frontiers in Bioengineering
